name: IBM Security Guidance
description: Collection of IBM-published security guidance and whitepapers. Spans many security topics including emerging areas (Generative AI controls, zero trust, hybrid cloud security).
relationToCloudSecurity: IBM Cloud and IBM's hybrid-cloud focus are reflected in much of the guidance content.
relationToAISecurity: Includes the Generative AI Controls Framework Whitepaper (subdirectory). IBM is a significant publisher of AI security guidance.

license.notes: Vendor-published guidance document. Distribution terms per vendor's terms of use.

current_extraction.notes: Direct collection. Subdirectories contain individual whitepapers with their own metadata.

notes: Parent collection — see subdirectories for individual whitepapers.
